results.title: Heartbroken Katie Price's birthday went by without word from Lee Andrews
results.description: As Katie Price's missing husband, Lee Andrews, has not reached out to her on her birthday, Princess and Junior Andre shared lovely birthday tributes for their mum. The family made sure to be there for the worried former glamour model, as Lee has been missing for nine...

results.title: Vishnu Priya files police complaint against channel over alleged defamatory content
results.description: South actress Vishnu Priya has lodged a police complaint in Hyderabad accusing YouTube channel “Play Like Incognito” of spreading false, sensational, and damaging content about her personal and professional life, leading to online harassment and reputational harm.

results.description: CANNES: Cannes veteran and Bollywood diva Aishwarya Rai Bachchan on Friday marked a stunning presence on the red carpet of the prestigious global film festival.
